sharedPost.text:
A dozen faces we can’t wait to see on Sunday!
We are bringing together BRITAIN’S BEST storytellers
And YOU ARE INVITED!

State of the Story Conference
British Film Institute
July 12th, 10am-5pm

4 discussion panels, each one hour long, covering getting an agent and selling a script, creating a series, crafting a film and a keynote conversation with SIR STEPHEN FREARS

Every attendee receives 3 months of online access to the full video recording so you can retain what you learn.

Limited tickets remaining, don’t miss it!

#londonwriters #londonfilmmakers #ukscreenwriters

items.text:
💪 POSZUKUJEMY UMIĘŚNIONYCH PANÓW 💪
#plan reklamowy
Hej, Panowie! 👋
Macie dobrą formę i nie boicie się kamery? To mamy propozycję właśnie dla Was! 😎
Szukamy dobrze zbudowanych, wysportowanych mężczyzn do 45. roku życia do udziału w nagraniach reklamy.

Warszawa // Czwartek, 09.07.
🍀Plan dzienny
Stawka: 160 zł

💌Zgłoszenia wysyłajcie na: ludzie@unagimedia.pl
Tytuł wiadomości: „Reklama – Rzym”
W treści maila prosimy o przesłanie:
👉imienia i nazwiska,
👉wieku,
👉numeru telefonu,
👉aktualnych zdjęć twarzy oraz sylwetki

Jeśli znacie kogoś, kto idealnie pasuje – przekazcie info! 🙌

Do zobaczenia na planie! 🦋

items.text:
Rolki motoryzacyjne | Poznań 16 lub 17.07
Do rolek motoryzacyjnych na social media poszukujemy aktora!

Mężczyzna (wiek 40-45 lat) - klient serwisu samochodowego, konieczne PRAWO JAZDY 

Aktor będzie prowadzić auto na ujęciach! 

Stawka 1600 zł 

ZGŁOSZENIA

Materiały: wideo wizytówkę, zdjęcia oraz dane: imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu, proszę wysyłać na casting@bigbearfilm.pl w tytule wpisując AKTOR 40-45 lat.

items.text:
Halo, halo! 🔥🤗
Kto ma ochotę usiąść na najciekawszej widowni w Polsce? 😎
W przyszłym tygodniu ponownie zapraszamy Was na nagrania programu „M I L I O N E R Z Y”! 
Jeśli chcecie zobaczyć, jak wygląda studio od kuchni, przeżyć emocje razem z uczestnikami i przekonać się, czy Hubert naprawdę jest tak czarujący na żywo (spoiler: jest 😉), to wpadajcie do nas!💙

Zbieramy zapisy publiczności na:
💛 13.07 (poniedziałek)
💛 14.07 (wtorek)
💛 15.07 (środa)
💛 18.07. (sobota)
💛 19.07. (niedziela)
💛 20.07. (poniedziałek)
⚠️ Mała prośba! W tych samych dniach: 13.07.,14.07.,15.07.20.07. nagrywamy również nasz muzyczny program „HIT”. Jeśli jesteście już zapisani na „HIT”, zostawcie miejsca na „Milionerów” innym i nie wysyłajcie drugiego zgłoszenia❤️

Stawka: 100 zł płatne gotówką po planie 
Dodatkowo kanapeczka i pączek w przerwie ☺️

💌Zgłoszenia:
👉 Formularz: https://forms.gle/Qe5N4yLzGDNn77KQ6
lub mailowo: ludzie@unagimedia.pl
Tytuł wiadomości: MILIO + wybrana data
(Imię, nazwisko, wiek, numer kontaktowy oraz wyraźne zdjęcie portretowe, osoby polskojęzyczne)

Oczywiście zapraszamy Was z przyjaciółmi, rodzinką ☺️🫶🌺
Do zobaczenia na nagraniach! 🥳

items.text:
Do nowego odcinka serialu GLINIARZE realizowanego w Warszawie oraz bliskich okolicach szukam PANÓW:

- Adrian Lipiński (37) – Mechanik samochodowy. Dobra sylwetka. Porywczy. 5 scen 
DATA: 16.07 i 17.07
STAWKA: 1200 netto za 2 dni

- Kuzyn (33) –  Wierzy, że dla rodziny trzeba wskoczyć w ogień. Doba sylwetka. 3 sceny 
OBOWIĄZKOWE PRAWO JAZDY!!!
DATA: 16.07 i 17.07
STAWKA: 800 zł netto za 2 dni

- Cezary Morawski (41) – Bezwzględny i brutalny lichwiarz. Normalna sylwetka, 1 scena 
DATA: 17.07
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

- Studenciak (24) – Porywczy i przebojowy. Z wyglądu punk/rockowiec. 1 scena 
OBOWIĄZOWE PRAWO JAZDY!!!
DATA: 17.07
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

- Kumpel  (23) – Kumpel Studenciaka. Razem studiują i imprezują. 
1 scena 
DATA: 17.07
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

- Dłużnik (25) – Niespełniony biznesmen, który popadł w długi i kłopoty. Ubrany w chinosy i koszulę. 1 scena 
DATA: 17.07
STAWKA: 300 zł netto

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia WYŁĄCZNIE MAILOWO na adres: outsetola@op.pl

W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.
W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę do nagrania scenę ze scenariusza)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach lub Gliniarzach Śląsk

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

items.text:
Cześć!

Do etiudy II roku reżyserii szkoły filmowej w 
Katowicach szukamy statystów.

Kręcimy w nocy z 14 na 15 lipca w pubie NIEBO w Katowicach. Szukamy ludzi w każdym wieku.

Niestety oferta non profit, ale sceny ze statystami nie powinny zająć całej nocy.

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na mail:
filipfurno@gmail.com 
O tytule "STATYŚCI - USA"

W mailu proszę podać dane kontaktowe oraz aktualne zdjęcia.

sharedPost.text:
🎬 UWAGA, ŚRODA! 
Misja specjalna – zostań profesjonalnym klaskaczem! 

Na jutrzejsze nagranie programu Taskmaster szukamy ludzi z talentem do… siedzenia na widowni! 😎

Jeśli masz 18–70 lat, potrafisz się śmiać (lub przynajmniej udawać 😅) i nie boisz się kamer – to czekamy właśnie na Ciebie!

🎥 Odcinek 1 – przyjazd 11:20, koniec ok. 15:15�

💸 Płacimy za siedzenie!�✔️ 50 zł za   odcinek�
(Tak, dobrze czytasz – można zarobić, siedząc i świetnie się bawiąc! 😁)
Miejsce nagrania: Warszawa Wawer

📱 Jak się zapisać?�
Wyślij SMS na 512 383 313 o treści ŚRODA:�➡️ imię i nazwisko�➡️ wiek

Zabierz znajomych – śmiech w grupie jest zdrowszy, a na planie zdecydowanie głośniejszy! 😂👏
⚠️ Odezwiemy się do wybranych osób.
RODO: Wysyłając zgłoszenie, wyrażasz zgodę na przetwarzanie swoich danych osobowych wyłącznie w celu rekrutacji do udziału w nagraniu programu.

Vorspiel/Guitar für Moulin Rouge
Erfolgreicher Broadway-Hit Moulin Rouge! Das Musical zieht im Herbst 2026 ins Theater am Großmarkt Hamburg ein.

Für diese Produktion suchen wir ein/e engagierte/n und erfahrene/nMusiker*in für die Teilung der Position Gitarre 2 ab Januar 2027.

Das Versenden des Vorspielmaterials erfolgt nach Ende der Bewerbungsfrist (26.7.2026).�Das Vorspiel wird im September 2026 in Hamburg stattfinden.

Alle Details:

https://www.atgentertainment.de/karriere/jobs/gitarre-mwd-moulin-rouge-das-musical-hamburg-hamburg/

Kontakt/Casting Director: Susanne Ortner 

susanne.ortner@atgentertainment.de

items.text:
We are thrilled to announce that after a completely SOLD-OUT run at the @shakespearenorthplayhouse They Were All Some Mothers' Sons is officially returning to Liverpool this September!

But first, we need to complete our family. We are officially casting for two vital roles:

Joey – RAF Pilot (m, playing age 18-24)

Rolf Rheinlander – German prisoner (playing age 20-25, able to recite a few lines in German)

Our casting will take place on Wednesday, 15th July 2026 at The Casa, Liverpool. 
 Rehearsals begin in September. Want to be part of this powerful, living history?

For more information or to book an audition slot, email: howl.michael1963@yahoo.co.uk

#LiverpoolTheatre #CastingCall #TheyWereAllSomeMothersSons #LiverpoolActors #TheCasa

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – LEAD ROLE 🎬

RED BRICK WAR is continuing its search for the lead role in our professionally produced proof-of-concept film.

We are currently looking for:

SONNY DOYLE

* Male
* Playing age: 35–45
* Authentic Liverpool (Scouse) accent essential
* Good physical condition (Essential)
* Strong dramatic ability
* Comfortable performing action sequences

Sonny is a former UK Special Forces operator who returns to Liverpool after his teenage nephew is left in a coma following a brutal gang attack. Quiet, disciplined and emotionally restrained, he carries years of experience, grief and determination beneath the surface.

No military experience is required. Professional weapons handling and tactical training will be provided before filming by our ex military staff & CQB instructors.

Please note: This is an unpaid proof-of-concept production created to showcase the project and secure investment for the feature film. Our aim is to produce work to the highest professional standard and build long-term relationships with the right cast and crew.

A huge thank you to everyone who has already submitted. We’ve received around 150 applications so far for various roles and are working our way through every single one. Every submission is being reviewed, and we’ll respond to everyone as soon as possible.

If you believe you’re right for Sonny Doyle, we’d love to hear from you.

Email: info@redbrickwar.co.uk
Website : www.redbrickwar.co.uk
Instagram : @redbrickwarfilm

topComments.text: A huge thank you to everyone who has already submitted. We’ve received around 150 applications so far for various roles and are working our way through every single one. Every submission is being reviewed, and we’ll respond to everyone as soon as possible.

items.text:
SINGING LESSONS - VOICE PROJECTION LESSONS FACE TO FACE AND ONLINE.
I’m a professional vocal coach based in Cambridge, with a conservatoire background and many years of experience as a trained opera singer. I’ve had the opportunity to work with international performers and bring that same level of coaching to my students locally and online.

I offer private singing lessons for both children and adults, either face to face or online.

For children and teens, lessons focus on:

• Building confidence and enjoying singing

• Improving vocal range and control

• Learning proper breathing and projection

• Preparing for auditions or ABRSM exams

For adults, I also offer voice coaching for:

• Singing development

• Public speaking and presentations

• Improving clarity and projection

I work with all levels, from complete beginners to more experienced singers, and tailor each lesson to the individual.

If you’d like to see examples of my work, there are videos and more information on my website below.

Happy to answer any questions or have a quick chat to see if it’s a good fit.

📍 Cambridge (also online available)

📞 07854 924209

📧 sebarotti@yahoo.com.ar

🌐 sebastianembrel.co.uk

items.text:
Hello,

I am looking for an actor (male- 55-65 years old) to play Edward, a respected, slightly guru-ish, singer/songwriter in a short feature (60mins approx.) shooting in London for two days in October and Portland, Dorset for two days in November this year.

The plot- Eve, a woman in her 60s, living in her mother's house (her mother has died) in Portland in a fairly chaotic manner- drinking, making the odd bit of art without a definite purpose. When she was younger she was in a band with her then partner Edward who has gone on to be a respected, successful, slightly 'guru-ish' singer/ songwriter. He comes to visit her out of the blue when he is touring nearby and they talk. 

That's sort of the whole plot. The drama is in the conversation and the tension between their worldviews, probably you could say particularly about creativity. 

Paid (£500 flat rate). More details below. Please get in touch if you are interested. If I have forgotten any important info please ask.

topComments.text: Messaged you

There follows a series of discussions of relationships, art, pain, £,500 flat fee witchcraft, ambition and dangerous spirits set against the awesome coastline. Edward- Male- 55-65 years Shooting 2 days in London Oct & 2 days in Portland, Dorset, UK, November 2026 Contact Jamie at- jamielynchpost@gmail.com WhatsApp: 07581905947 DiegeticPictures"

items.text:
Looking for new opportunities!
Dear friends,

I am currently looking for work as a professional ballet dancer.

If you know of any theatres, dance companies, event agencies, show productions, opera houses, cruise productions, or other projects looking for a ballerina, I would be very grateful for any recommendations or contacts.

I am a professional ballet and contemporary dancer, open to performances, productions, events, and creative collaborations.

Please feel free to message me or share this post. Thank you so much! 🤍

items.text:
🎬 LOS ANGELES FILM CREW & PRODUCTION VOLUNTEERS NEEDED – JULY 31
We’re currently building our production team for a professionally filmed, broadcast-quality awards gala taking place on Friday, July 31 in Inglewood, CA.

This is an opportunity to gain hands-on experience on a high-caliber, multi-camera live production while supporting an incredible cause. The evening will feature celebrity honorees, VIP guests, live musical performances, and cinematic video elements, with proceeds benefiting scholarships and educational opportunities for underserved students and families throughout Los Angeles.

We’re looking for experienced professionals, recent graduates, and advanced college students interested in the following roles:

• Production Manager

• Stage Manager

• Assistant Stage Manager

• Video Director / Switcher Operator (experienced)

• Camera Operator

• Playback / Graphics Operator

• Audio Assistant

• Lighting Technician

• Event Photographer

• Social Media Content Creator

• VIP / Talent Coordinator

• Production Assistants / Runners

Crew Details

📍 Inglewood, CA

📅 Friday, July 31

🕒 Crew Call: Approximately 3:00 PM

💻 One mandatory virtual production meeting prior to the event (scheduled around crew availability)

What You’ll Receive

✅ Professional production credit for your résumé/portfolio

✅ Hands-on experience on a large-scale live event

✅ Networking with experienced production and event professionals

✅ Meals provided

✅ Parking provided

Limited stipends may be available for select specialized technical positions based on experience.

If you’re interested, please email tdninvestmentgroups@gmail.com with:

* Your résumé

* A brief summary of your experience

* Production credits and/or portfolio (if available)

* The position(s) you’re interested in

* Your contact information

We’re looking for passionate, dependable team members who want to contribute to a meaningful event while gaining valuable live production experience. We look forward to hearing from you!

topComments.text: I am interested. Please reach out

sharedPost.text:
Angela Boehm Casting is now casting a FEMALE STAND-IN for the Feature Film 'DRIFTER.' 

This project will be taking place in the Northeast, OH area.

Please read carefully below for details.

DETAILS:

Project: Feature Film 'DRIFTER'

Filming Location: Northeast, OH area

Shoot Dates:  Approximately 8 days during the shoot spread of July 15th through July 24th 2026.

*These dates are subject to change, so please only submit if you are FULLY AVAILABLE for ALL DATES with flexibility.*

Stand-In Rate: $128 for 8 hours

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

Stand-In

Gender: Female

Ethnicity: White

Age: 18+

Height: 5'5" - 5'7"

Weight: 100lbs - 120lbs

HOW TO SUBMIT:
In order to submit for this role, please send an email to team@angelaboehmcasting.com with the following information:

SUBJECT LINE: DRIFTER Female Stand-In - (YOUR FULL NAME)

PLEASE INCLUDE:

- Full Name

- Height

- Weight

- Phone Number

- 1 CURRENT Waist-Up or Headshot Photo

- 1 CURRENT Full-Body Photo

- Let us know of any past film or stand-in experience.

- Any conflicts on/around the shoot spread of July 15th through July 24th 2026.

***PLEASE REMEMBER: These dates are tentative and subject to change, so please only submit if you are FULLY AVAILABLE for ALL DATES with flexibility.***

PLEASE NOTE: This is just a submission. If you are booked, we will reach out to YOU.

Kind regards,

items.text:
Time to make a stand 

Special Needs Revolt

Fictional In-Story Campaign: “Voices Can’t Be Locked Away”

Premise

In the world of Special Needs Revolt, a group of residents, families, and allies organize a peaceful movement after years of neglect and mistreatment at a fictional state institution. Their goal is not revenge or overthrowing the government, but exposing injustice, demanding accountability, and ensuring people with disabilities are treated with dignity and respect.

Campaign Motto

“Nothing About Us Without Us.”

Main Slogans

* “Voices Can’t Be Locked Away.”
* “Dignity Is a Right.”
* “See the Person, Not the Disability.”
* “Every Voice Matters.”
* “Freedom Through Inclusion.”

Campaign Activities

* Peaceful marches with handmade signs.
* Candlelight vigils honoring former residents.
* Public storytelling events where characters share their experiences.
* Art and music exhibitions created by residents.
* Meetings with fictional legislators and journalists.
* Community forums focused on accessibility, independence, and inclusion.

Symbol

A blue and gold butterfly emerging from an open gate, representing hope, freedom, and transformation.

Campaign Speech (Film Scene)

“We are not invisible. We are not broken. We are people with dreams, talents, families, and voices that deserve to be heard. For too long, others have decided what our lives should look like. Today we stand together—not with anger, but with courage. Not to divide, but to build something better. We believe every person deserves respect, opportunity, and the freedom to choose their own future. Our voices can’t be locked away anymore.”

Ending

The campaign inspires public support across the fictional state. Investigations into the institution begin, reforms are announced, residents gain greater independence and opportunities, and the movement becomes a lasting symbol of hope for future generations.

⸻

Support the Film

If this story inspires you, please watch Special Needs Revolt on Tubi and Prime Video. After watching, please leave a review on Letterboxd and IMDb to help more people discover the film. Your support helps independent filmmakers and encourages more stories that celebrate inclusion, resilience, and the disability community.

items.text:
My movie platform is almost ready. A few changes still need to be made, but I’d love for some filmmakers to test it out.
If you’re a filmmaker and you already have a short film, feature film, trailer, or any finished project, feel free to join and upload it here:

zeusai.us/movies

Don’t worry about the domain name or title yet — that will be changed soon, probably by this Friday.

For now, I just need a few guinea pigs lol. Try it out, upload your work, and let me know if you run into any issues or anything that needs to be fixed.

Filmmakers only, please. I really appreciate the help.

Just pm me if you have any issues.

My movie platform is almost ready. A few changes still need to be made, but I’d love for some filmmakers to test it out.

topComments.text: It looks like you’re using ai to make a platform for ai but branding it as for filmmakers. It was only a week when I first saw you post this asking for feedback and my advice was to try to do something nobody else is doing. You have to respect creatives in this space. Building an app shouldn’t be your get rich quick strategy

**BRANDED SKIT CASTING CALL, NON-UNION - PAID**

***“BRANDED LAPTOP SKIT” ***

**Director:** Reangsei Phos & Kevin Jin Kwan Kim 

**Producers:** Brooke Fusick 

**Category:** Branded Skit

**Union Status:** Non-Union

**Compensation:** $200. Food/crafty provided.

**Filming Dates/Location:** July 11/12, 2026 / Vancouver, BC

**Deadline to Submit:** Monday, July 6, 2026

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:** Please email **onepointfive.collective@gmail.com** with the subject

heading** [Your Name - Role Name]** and include your headshot/photo, resume and demo

reel (if applicable). 

**LOGLINE:** Our hero jumps through different time periods and universes in the search of finding their perfect laptop.

**Medieval Villagers ** -*** Any Age/Gender.*** ***SUPPORTING. ***A medieval crowd of villagers that are rowdy and unsophisticated. They boo and cheer at a public execution. We’re primarily seeking those that have messy and ungroomed hair and interesting faces.

**Retirement Home Elderly ** - ***Any Gender, age 60+. SUPPORTING.*** Elderly folks living at a retirement home that spend their days playing ping pong and building complex domino setups.

Hi filmmakers,
I’m always looking to collaborate with talented, thoughtful people who are telling stories that matter. I’ve been fortunate to build a long career as a character actor, working in comedy and drama, in both film and television.  

IMDB: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=a5fxXO6bNx8](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=a5fxXO6bNx8)

DEMO: [https://www.imdb.com/name/nm0835725/?ref_=fn_al_nm_1](https://www.imdb.com/name/nm0835725/?ref_=fn_al_nm_1) 

At this stage, I’m especially excited by strong scripts, bold directors, and roles that let me bring humanity, humor, and depth to the screen. Please take a look at my demo reel. I’d be grateful for your consideration, and I’d love to connect about the possibility of working together.

items.text:
📣 **Parents, considering home education from September? **
***Feeling nervous? Not sure where to start?***

Hi 👋🏼
We are Josh & Aimee, owners of Swan Tutoring! An online, flexible education platform for home educating families 🏡

In August** we are holding an **✨** Open Week **✨ designed for those who are considering home education and are new to it, and those who have been home educating for a while!** You can try our engaging online classes for just £3 (+VAT) per lesson per screen!**

☕️💬 There are also some FREE online **social events** included, giving you chance to meet other home educating families**.**

And receive a FREE **welcome pack** delivered to your door! 📦🏡

Let me know if you'd like more information! 😊
Best regards,
Aimee
Swan Tutoring

CASTING BACKGROUND KIDS & PARENTS

Seeking young talents (6-10 y/o) & parents to be in a **MAMM21** (Mighty Asian Moviemaking Marathon) Short Film Finalist project, “**Crooked Wings**”.

Volunteer | Non-union

Open gender & ethnicity

**Shoot dates: **July 18 & 19

**Shooting Location:** Metro Vancouver, BC

Meals & crafty will be provided on set

**Submit to: **sally@yymediaco.com

**Subject line: **Crooked Wings Background - Your Name 

Make sure to include your full name, contact information including your phone number, headshots, demo reel or previous acting footage, most recent size card and availability confirmation for July 18 & 19.

🎬 **PAID NON-UNION SELF-TAPE AUDITION – REMOTE**

I'm casting **one male or female actor (ages 20–40)** for a short satirical social media commercial for **Ravage Recovery**.

💰 **Pay:** $200 CAD

This is a **remote self-tape**.

We're looking for someone with strong comedic timing who can deliver a natural, authentic performance. Improvisation and creativity are encouraged.

The selected performance will be used in digital advertising for Ravage Recovery.

**Please see the attached casting breakdown for full details, audition instructions, and submission information.**

Looking forward to seeing your submissions!

items.text:
# 🎬 CASTING CALL – NO-BUDGET INDIE FEATURE FILM

We are currently casting **8 volunteer actors** for an upcoming independent feature film shooting in **Langley, BC**.

This is an excellent opportunity for actors looking to build their portfolio, gain valuable on-set experience, and collaborate with a passionate team of independent filmmakers.
## Roles Available

**4 Male Actors**
* Ethnicity: Indian
* Age: 30–40

**4 Female Actors**
* Ethnicity: Indian
* Age: 30–40
## Shoot Details

**Location:** Langley, BC

**Shoot Dates:**
* Saturday, July 25, 2026
* Sunday, July 26, 2026

**Time:** 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM (approximately)
## Compensation

This is a **volunteer (non-paid)** opportunity.

The following will be provided:
* Meals and refreshments
* Screen credits (IMDb, where applicable)
* Copy of the completed film for your demo reel (when available)
* Valuable experience working on an independent feature film
## How to Apply

Please send:
* Headshot
* Resume (if available)
* Demo reel or self-tape
* Contact information

Selected applicants will receive additional information about the project and audition/self-tape requirements.
# Character Descriptions
## **Mukesh** (Male, 30–40) — **Lead Supporting Role**

**Dialogue:** Approximately **10 dialogues**

A fun-loving and outgoing individual who naturally takes charge in social situations. He has a dominant personality, struggles to accept opposing opinions, and often takes disagreements personally. While charismatic, he can also be vindictive when he feels wronged.

## **Payal** (Female, 30–40) — **Supporting Role**

**Dialogue:** Approximately **1 dialogue**

Mukesh's wife. Warm, cheerful, and easygoing, she understands her husband's strengths and flaws better than anyone. She isn't afraid to challenge him when he's in the wrong and often serves as the voice of reason.

## **Chirag** (Male, 30–40) — **Lead Supporting Role**

**Dialogue:** Approximately **10 dialogues**

Honest, fair, and good-natured. Chirag enjoys spending time with friends but prefers a peaceful, drama-free life. Calm, composed, and level-headed, he avoids unnecessary conflict whenever possible.

## **Neha** (Female, 30–40) — **Supporting Role**

**Dialogue:** Approximately **5 dialogues**

Chirag's wife. She presents herself as simple, calm, and soft-spoken, but beneath the surface she is adventurous, emotionally reactive, and full of surprises. She is exceptionally good at hiding this side of herself from others.

## **Ajay** (Male, 30–40) — **Supporting Role**

**Dialogue:** Approximately **2 dialogues**

Friendly and sociable on the surface but ultimately self-serving. He has no hesitation in getting close to people if it benefits him. Ego-driven and controlling, especially in his relationship with his wife, he likes to be in charge.

## **Disha** (Female, 30–40) — **Supporting Role**

**Dialogue:** **No dialogue (featured performance)**

Ajay's wife. Genuine, kind-hearted, and always smiling. She enjoys having fun, treats everyone with respect, and never engages in gossip or speaks negatively about others. Calm, composed, and quietly resilient.

## **Rajiv** (Male, 30–40) — **Lead Supporting Role**

**Dialogue:** Approximately **8 dialogues**

Reserved, shy, and thoughtful. Rajiv enjoys being around friends but tends to stay in the background. Calm and composed, he is a quiet observer rather than the center of attention.

## **Jaya** (Female, 30–40) — **Supporting Role**

**Dialogue:** Approximately **1 dialogue**

Rajiv's wife. Gentle, warm, and soft-spoken. Like Rajiv, she is shy and reserved but enjoys social gatherings in a quieter way. She has a calm presence and a genuinely kind nature.

**Submission deadline 23rd July 2026.**

items.text:
# **Casting opportunity (paid)**

Hi, I’m looking for 2 actresses/models for a skincare brand shoot.

The shoot will focus on creating natural, appealing images and short video clips showing face, arms, hands and product interaction (holding tubs / small bottles and applying skincare products in small amounts). 

**The ideal person would:**
*     Be approximately 45-60 years old
*     Be comfortable in front of both still photography and short video clips (no dialogue or speaking required - the video will focus on natural movement and expressions)
*     Be comfortable with face and hand close-ups
*     Be able to take direction and communicate natural expressions

**Styling requirements:**
*     Simple, natural styling preferred
*     Very light, natural makeup suitable for skincare imagery
*     Tidy, natural-looking hair styling
*     No professional hair and makeup team will be provided, so confidence in preparing your own look is important

An additional bonus would be someone with experience or an interest in hand modelling, as some shots will involve close-ups of hands applying skincare products.

**Details:**
*     Paid opportunity (details will be discussed with shortlisted applicants)
*     Potential for a follow-up paid shoot (with a free product)
*     Location: Nottingham
*     Duration: 3 hours
*     Date: Within the next 3 weeks (exact date to be confirmed)
*     Usage: brand content including website and social media (full details will be discussed before the shoot).
*     Selected professionally edited images and video clips from the shoot will also be available for your acting/modelling portfolio.

**If you are interested, please comment ' INTERESTED ' below or send me a message with:**
*     A recent photo/headshot (with visible / real skin texture, i.e. minimal make-up / retouching)
*     Your location
*     Any relevant acting/modelling experience
*     Examples of previous beauty or lifestyle work if available (not essential)

The shoot will be directed and photographed by me - many of you may know me through my headshot work.

Thank you,
Andrej

PS: I posted this on Starnow and Mandy so feel free to apply there if that's easier for you (links in the comments).

topComments.text: Interested Nottingham based

Interested

Message sent. All the information has been sent. Many thanks

items.text:
I nearly killed Patsy Palmer.

Not a joke. 

Not an exaggeration.

Late 1990s, EastEnders back lot. I'm playing a gangster, I've been handed the keys to a brand new sports car, and all I have to do is drive it up to Bianca's market stall, stop on my mark, and say my lines. 

Two lines. Simple.

Except I'd never driven an automatic before. And instead of admitting it, I said: "Yeah, of course I can drive it."

Ten minutes of practice later, the director calls action. I put my foot down, panic, and crash straight into the stall — missing Patsy by inches. The thing jumped ten feet. 

The 1st AD went absolutely mental. And I sat in that car, frozen, thinking my career was over before it had really started.

There's a lesson in this mess — one every actor needs to hear before they learn it the hard way on set. As usual, the link is in the comments.🎬 

Honesty in this industry isn't just a virtue — it's what keeps you working. Share your own "on-set disaster" in the comments. I know I'm not the only one who's been there.

items.text:
Poszukujemy bohaterek w różnym wieku (mama z córką, babcia z wnuczką, koleżanki z pracy albo przyjaciółki) do kolejnych odcinków nowego programu realizowanego dla stacji telewizyjnej.

1. Szukamy dwóch kobiet, takich prawdziwych przyjaciółek, które łączy autentyczna relacja. Idealnym scenariuszem byłoby, gdyby przed laty chodziły razem do liceum lub szkoły- Nie jest to jednak warunek konieczny. Najważniejsze jest, aby była między nimi naturalna chemia, wspólna historia i swoboda w kontakcie ze sobą. Bo będą wspólnie występować w odcinku i siebie wspierać w wyborach stylizacji.

2. Tematem odcinka będzie metamorfoza modowa. Nasze bohaterki, przy wsparciu stylistów, będą poszukiwać idealnego stylu dopasowanego do konkretnego wydarzenia. W tym przypadku będzie to zjazd absolwentów dawnego liceum, do którego uczęszczały i teraz wspólnie na taki zjazd pojadą.

3. Zdjęcia będą realizowane w lipcu i sierpniu w Warszawie i będą to całodniowe nagrania. Dokładne terminy do ustalenia.

4. Wynagrodzenie, jakie proponujemy: 700 zł netto/osoba. Razem 2 osoby 1 400 zł netto (płatne w ciągu 1 dnia po nagraniach — BLIK/konto bankowe)

5. Szukamy osób, które nie są kojarzone z wcześniejszych udziałów w popularnych programach telewizyjnych, reality show czy serialach. Chcemy pracować z autentycznymi bohaterkami, z którymi widzowie będą mogli się utożsamić.

Dodatkowo zależałoby nam, aby po zakończeniu zdjęć uczestniczki nie pojawiały się przez około 2–3 miesiące w innych programach telewizyjnych lub serialach, które mogłyby wpłynąć na odbiór ich udziału w naszym formacie.

6. Będziemy potrzebowali krótkich filmów zgłoszeniowych od kandydatek. Program opiera się w dużej mierze na relacjach, emocjach i rozmowach z bohaterkami, dlatego bardzo zależy nam na osobach, które czują się swobodnie przed kamerą i potrafią naturalnie opowiadać o sobie.

W razie zainteresowania, spełnienia wymagań, prosimy o wysłanie zgłoszenia, podając następujące informację dwóch osób:

1. Imię i nazwisko swoje oraz drugiej osoby

2. Rok urodzenia obu pań

3. Miasto zamieszkania

4. Telefony kontaktowe

5. Adresy e-mail

6. Wzrost obu pań

7. Link do swojego profilu na Facebooku oraz drugiej osoby

8. Krótki opis dotychczasowego doświadczenia

9. Krótkie nagranie video wraz z podstawowymi informacjami o relacji. Najlepiej, jeśli będzie to nagranie wspólnie dwóch pań.

10. Minimum po 1 zdjęć z każdej pań

Kontakt: rekrutacja@agencjainfernal.pl

W temacie wiadomości prosimy napisać: Program TV Bohaterki

Wysłanie zgłoszenie jest jednoznaczne z wyrażeniem zgody na przetwarzanie danych osobowych w celu udziału w programie zgodnie z Rozporządzeniem Parlamentu Europejskiego i Rady (UE) 2016/679 z dnia 27 kwietnia 2016 r. w sprawie ochrony osób fizycznych w związku z przetwarzaniem danych osobowych i w sprawie swobodnego przepływu takich danych oraz uchylenia dyrektywy 95/46/WE (ogólne rozporządzenie o ochronie danych). Administratorem Twoich danych osobowych pozyskanych w procesie rekrutacyjnym jest Agencja Artystyczna INFERNAL. Podanie danych jest dobrowolne, w każdej chwili przysługuje Ci prawo do wglądu do danych, ich poprawiania lub usunięcia. Kontakt do administratora rekrutacja@agencjainfernal.pl.

Dziewczynka (6-8 lat) – naprawdę zdolna aktorsko
Kobieta (35-45 lat)

✅ i numer kontaktowy.

items.text:
Halo, halo! 🔥🤗
Kto ma ochotę usiąść na najciekawszej widowni w Polsce? 😎
W przyszłym tygodniu ponownie zapraszamy Was na nagrania programu „M I L I O N E R Z Y”! 
Jeśli chcecie zobaczyć, jak wygląda studio od kuchni, przeżyć emocje razem z uczestnikami i przekonać się, czy Hubert naprawdę jest tak czarujący na żywo (spoiler: jest 😉), to wpadajcie do nas!💙

Zbieramy zapisy publiczności na:
💛 13.07 (poniedziałek)
💛 14.07 (wtorek)
💛 15.07 (środa)
💛 18.07. (sobota)
💛 19.07. (niedziela)
💛 20.07. (poniedziałek)
⚠️ Mała prośba! W tych samych dniach: 13.07.,14.07.,15.07.20.07. nagrywamy również nasz muzyczny program „HIT”. Jeśli jesteście już zapisani na „HIT”, zostawcie miejsca na „Milionerów” innym i nie wysyłajcie drugiego zgłoszenia❤️

Stawka: 100 zł płatne gotówką po planie 
Dodatkowo kanapeczka i pączek w przerwie ☺️

💌Zgłoszenia:
👉 Formularz: https://forms.gle/Qe5N4yLzGDNn77KQ6
lub mailowo: ludzie@unagimedia.pl
Tytuł wiadomości: MILIO + wybrana data
(Imię, nazwisko, wiek, numer kontaktowy oraz wyraźne zdjęcie portretowe, osoby polskojęzyczne)

Oczywiście zapraszamy Was z przyjaciółmi, rodzinką ☺️🫶🌺
Do zobaczenia na nagraniach! 🥳

items.text:
🎬 Szukamy statystów do teledysku! 🎬
W najbliższą niedzielę (12.07) w Warszawie realizujemy zdjęcia do teledysku i szukamy chętnych do udziału jako statyści. Nagranie w godzinach 8-20.

📍 Udział jest non profit

Szukamy: 

- osób w wieku około 18-30 lat (większa grupa ok 20 osób),

- osoby do roli nauczyciela (ok 40-50 lat),

- osoby do roli lizusa (ok 18-25 lat)

- osoby o tęższej sylwetce (ok 18-25 lat)

Jeśli masz ochotę przeżyć dzień na planie filmowym, poznać fajnych ludzi i dołożyć swoją cegiełkę do powstania teledysku – napisz do mnie w wiadomości prywatnej! 📩

Proszę o kontakt w wiadomości prywatnej z podaniem adresu e-mail.

Do nowego odcinka serialu GLINIARZE realizowanego w Warszawie oraz bliskich okolicach szukam PAŃ:

- Sąsiadka (około 40 lat) – Sąsiadka Artura. Porusza się na wózku. Zaangażowana w społeczność, w której żyje. Ubiera się z nutką elegancji i szykowności. 3 sceny 
DATA: 17.07
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

- Hanna Kowalewska (około 30 lat) – Cwaniara, której najbardziej zależy na pieniądzach.  2 sceny 
OBOWIĄZKOWE PRAWO JAZDY!!!
DATA: 17.07
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia WYŁĄCZNIE MAILOWO na adres: outsetola@op.pl

W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.
W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę do nagrania scenę ze scenariusza)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach lub Gliniarzach Śląsk

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu

sharedPost.text:
We are now casting  for our touring   Autumn show Viva Las Vegas .

The show is a musical  show featuring songs  of Sinatra, Judy Garland , Fred Astaire And Ginger Rogers  as well; as songs from Top Hat,  Easter Parade, The Wizard Of Oz  and more.

We are looking for an experienced hardworking M/F  performer who are keen to take quality musical shows to the community  based   venues .

The show is a one man/woman show so we are looking for experienced performers that can hold an audience and are looking for engaging vocalist performers.

Rehearsals- 24th -28th August  

Playing Dates- 31st  August  -30th October

We work Monday to Friday (2 x 60 minute shows per day)

Casting Breakdown

We are offering 700.00 per week plus fuel on the road as well as accommodation allowance  if needed on the road

Please send details including a singing reel  to info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk

Thank you! 🎭✨

We’re casting for the trial stage of a new dating show that will be livestreamed on TikTok.

During the date, daters will receive text messages with questions, thoughts and suggestions submitted by the live audience to help spark conversation.

We’re looking for authentic, genuine daters who are comfortable being themselves on camera and open to honest conversations. This is a paid opportunity and filming is taking place in Hackney, London.

items.text:
Casting Caucasian child actress for 3 day shoot in East Sussex August 5-7:

We are shooting a high value 10 minute short film and are looking to cast a young girl  between 6-8 to play 6 for 1 of the lead roles. 
No previous acting experience is necessary, we are seeking enthusiastic girls who are outgoing, look younger than their age, and may love performing. 
Parent will be required to be present at all times on set. Professional cast and crew includes a director from Marvel. 

Small pay stipend available. 

Please note this film contains offensive themes of racism but no actual obscene dialogue.

We are also looking for a few parent / child pairs to play extras for 1 day in the school parking lot.

Please message me. 
Thank you!

items.text:
Poszukuję dziewczyny w wieku około 20–28 lat do roli psychoterapeutki w projekcie w klimacie komedia / dramat psychologiczny z motywem ulicznego rapu.

Chcę nagrać kilka mocnych, klimatycznych scen testowych, które później planuję wysłać dalej do producenta. Projekt opiera się na historii bohatera po przejściach, rozmowach z psychologiem, emocjach, ulicznym przekazie i czarnym humorze.

Kogo szukam:

dziewczyny z Kielc lub okolic,

swobodnej przed kamerą,

inteligentnej, naturalnej i komunikatywnej,

najlepiej z wyczuciem aktorskim,

jeśli potrafisz śpiewać albo czujesz muzykę, to dodatkowy plus,

osoby, która sama świadomie decyduje o udziale i nie będzie później robić konfliktów(głównie chodzi mi o brak chłopaka,mam nauczkę po ostatnim)

Sceny bez nagości, bez całowania i bez dziwnych akcji. Chodzi o klimat, dialog, psychologię postaci i dobre aktorstwo.

Mam sporo pomysłów, więc możliwa też stała współpraca przy kolejnych klipach i scenach. Na start chcę nagrać materiał pokazowy/pilotowy.
SPORZĄDZIMY UMOWĘ,ZOSTAW KOMENTARZ,ODEZWĘ SIĘ.

topComments.text: Jestem chętna bardziej niż bardzo;)
priv

items.text:
I went from a rough youth in Germany to dancing with Pina Bausch,Flying Steps,choreographing Bollywood awards to international stages, training with industry pioneers,
and mentoring street kids for free in stairwells who became world champions in freestyle.
Years later i met Jasper and Jeroen Krabbè who connected me to a Agent and
now, I am channeling that raw, lived life experience into acting, bringing genuine grit, discipline, and presence to the camera.

My phone and laptop got stolen wich is why I can only share a few non professional pictures.

Go easy on me,in the acting world im a beginner and didn't had any major role yet.
Im open for auditions, castings, and collaborations,DM me if you're interested.

topComments.text: Do you have Instagram? I'm an actor/writer/director....I'd love to find ways to collaborate. 🙏🏻

items.summary:
I went from a rough youth in Germany to dancing with Pina Bausch,Flying Steps,choreographing Bollywood awards to international stages, training with industry pioneers,
and mentoring street kids for free in stairwells who became world champions in freestyle.
Years later i met Jasper and Jeroen Krabbè who connected me to a Agent and
now, I am channeling that raw, lived life experience into acting, bringing genuine grit, discipline, and presence to the camera.

My phone and laptop got stolen wich is why I can only share a few non professional pictures.

Go easy on me,in the acting world im a beginner and didn't had any major role yet.
Im open for auditions, castings, and collaborations,DM me if you're interested.

items.text:
CASTING CALL – LEAD ROLE (ITALIAN SPEAKER)

A STRANGE DAY (SHORT FILM)

We are currently casting the lead role for A Strange Day, an independent short film developed between Germany and Italy and intended for international film festivals.

Looking for a young Italian football player—or someone who could convincingly be one—for the lead role

This project is fully self funded by the crew members so unfortunately this is an UNPAID role

ROLE: GUIDO CAPPELLI

Male | Playing Age 16–20

Guido is a 17-year-old Italian football player participating in an international youth tournament in Germany.

While his teammates focus on winning, Guido gradually becomes fascinated by the mysterious forests surrounding the sports complex. What begins as curiosity slowly turns into a journey through adolescence, imagination, isolation and self-discovery.

We are looking for someone with a natural screen presence and emotional authenticity rather than extensive acting experience.

REQUIREMENTS

✓ Fluent Italian speaker (required)

✓ Playing age 16–18

✓ Athletic build

✓ Football experience is welcome but not essential

✓ Strong expressive presence on camera

✓ Based in Berlin, or in nearest areas of Germany

ABOUT THE FILM

A Strange Day is a mystery inspired by youth football culture, personal memories, and the visual tradition of Italian Giallo cinema.

The film explores a universal feeling many people experienced growing up: the moment when you begin to drift away from the group around you and start searching for your own place in the world.

SHOOTING

Germany, Berlin

1-5th August 2026

TO APPLY

Please send:

•⁠  ⁠Headshot

•⁠  ⁠Recent photos

•⁠  ⁠Age and city where you based now

•⁠  ⁠Acting experience (if any)

•⁠  ⁠Football experience (if any)

Subject:

GUIDO CASTING – Your Name

Contact:

Hannahrynevich@gmail.com

items.text:
**🎥  CASTING CALL OUT 🎥**

We are casting for a short film based on a research project exploring the experiences and emotions of ethnic minority police officers within the police force.

The film is voiceover-led, with the characters’ inner thoughts and feelings heard through narration. We are looking for performers who can convey emotion on screen through natural, grounded and compelling performances.

We are currently casting:

**AISHA**
Asian woman, playing a Constable

**SAMIR**
Asian man, playing a frontline officer

**RODGER**
Afro-Caribbean man, playing a Detective

We are also looking for extras of all ethnicities, so there will be a range of opportunities to get involved.

**Filming:** Week commencing 10th August
**Location:** In and around Leicestershire
**Roles:** Paid

To apply, please email your name, headshot and showreel to: olivia@candegroup.co.uk

items.text:
We are casting Spanish-speaking actors for A Distancia, an independent Spanish-language short film filming in Los Angeles this fall.

We are currently seeking performers for:

• Leonardo (Male, 20–25)
• Camila (Female, 20–25)

Please swipe through the images below for the full character breakdowns.

Compensation: Deferred based on the successful completion of our crowdfunding campaign. Meals, IMDb credit, and a digital copy of the completed film will be provided.

🎭 Apply at: byosiel.com/casting

📩 Questions: casting@byosiel.com

We look forward to reviewing your submission!

items.text:
Hi everybody,

Does anyone have any movies that are not under active distribution? If so, we hopefully want to interest you in joining the platform. 

FLINK was created to help independent films continue finding audiences long after their festival run or theatrical release cycle has ended. The platform provides a home for films that may no longer have active distribution, as well as titles that are difficult to access through current streaming services and traditional distribution channels.

Filmmakers retain full ownership, set their own pricing and territorial availability, and can remove their films from the platform at any time.

The platform is entirely free to join, with audiences purchasing directly from filmmakers.

We are officially launching live to the public on 21 July 2026. 

If this sounds of interest, I'd be delighted to send over our information pack and answer any questions you may have. Send me an email on klara@flink.movie.

thank you))

Hi everybody,

Does anyone have any movies that are not under active distribution? If so, we hopefully want to interest you in joining the platform. 

FLINK was created to help independent films continue finding audiences long after their festival run or theatrical release cycle has ended. The platform provides a home for films that may no longer have active distribution, as well as titles that are difficult to access through current streaming services and traditional distribution channels.

Filmmakers retain full ownership, set their own pricing and territorial availability, and can remove their films from the platform at any time.

The platform is entirely free to join, with audiences purchasing directly from filmmakers.

We are officially launching live to the public on 21 July 2026. 

If this sounds of interest, I'd be delighted to send over our information pack and answer any questions you may have. Send me an email on klara@flink.movie.

thank you))

items.text:
Hi everyone! I’m currently building my acting headshot portfolio and would love to offer complimentary headshot sessions to some fellow actors.

📍 My studio is based in Irvine, CA.

You can check out some of my work and more info at www.kooheadshots.com.

I’m only opening up a limited number of spots, and I’d love the opportunity to work with you! If you’re interested, DM me here. Looking forward to meeting some of you! 😊

📣 ***Home educating parents! We have lots of exciting online classes lined up for September! ***🤩
***Do any of these subjects take your interest?...***

Life Skills 🌱

Healthy Habits 🍎

Money Management 💷 - NEW

Business Builders 💡 - NEW 

English ✍️

Book Club 📚

Maths 🟰

Maths Fluency 🟰

Science 🔬

Psychology 🧠

Biology 🐸 - NEW

Piano 🎹

Guitar 🎸- NEW

Singing 🎶- NEW

Drama 🎭 - NEW

Art 🎨

Reception 👶

Phonics 🗣️

History 🏛️

Geography 🌎

Social Studies 🪭

World Explorers ✈️

British Sign Language 🙌🏼

Mandarin Chinese 🇨🇳 - NEW

Spanish 🇪🇸

French 🇫🇷

GCSE 🎓

**The issue is though**, it can be tricky to know if your child will take to online learning, or to the subject! 🙈

Well, to help with this,** we are holding an **✨** Open Week **✨** where you can try these classes for just £3 (+VAT) per lesson per screen!**

☕️💬 There are also some FREE online **social events** included, giving you chance to meet other home educating families**.**

And receive a FREE **welcome pack** delivered to your door! 📦🏡

Let me know if you'd like more information! 😊
Best regards,
Aimee
Swan Tutoring

items.text:
# ***CASTING CALL***

**LEKEN NY NORSK FILM OG SØKER FØLGENDE:**

**GUTT** - spillealder 12 (10-15 år oppfordres til å søke. Skuespillererfaring og piano ferdigheter er ikke et krav, men et pluss)

**KVINNER OG MENN** - 30-50 år

**MINDRE ROLLER/STATISTER** - alle kan søke

**CREW/BAK KAMERA **- Ønsker du å bidra med noe bak? - ta kontakt!

**HONORAR, TID OG STED:**
Opptak foregår i august/september i Oslo og omegn, fordelt på få dager.
– Hovedroller: honoreres (avtales individuelt).
– Mindre roller/statister: ulønnet, men vi dekker mat og reise, og holder opptaksdagene korte og effektive – vi respekterer tiden din.
Du blir en del av en proff produksjon med erfarne skuespillere.

Send mail til casting@lekenfilm.no med kort om deg og hvorfor du vil være med, og merk emnefelt i mail med:

GUTT/MANN/DAME + ALDER,

eller:

STATIST, CREW eller ANNET

Aktuelle kandidater kalles inn til audition i Juli.

HONORAR, TID OG STED:
Opptak foregår i august/september i Oslo og omegn, fordelt på få dager.
– Hovedroller: honoreres (avtales individuelt).
– Mindre roller/statister: ulønnet, men vi dekker mat og reise, og holder opptaksdagene korte og effektive – vi respekterer tiden din. Du blir en del av en proff produksjon med erfarne skuespillere. 

Spørsmål? Send mail!

Lykke til!

items.summary:
# ***CASTING CALL***

**LEKEN NY NORSK FILM OG SØKER FØLGENDE:**

**GUTT** - spillealder 12 (10-15 år oppfordres til å søke. Skuespillererfaring og piano ferdigheter er ikke et krav, men et pluss)

**KVINNER OG MENN** - 30-50 år

**MINDRE ROLLER/STATISTER** - alle kan søke

**CREW/BAK KAMERA **- Ønsker du å bidra med noe bak? - ta kontakt!

**HONORAR, TID OG STED:**
Opptak foregår i august/september i Oslo og omegn, fordelt på få dager.
– Hovedroller: honoreres (avtales individuelt).
– Mindre roller/statister: ulønnet, men vi dekker mat og reise, og holder opptaksdagene korte og effektive – vi respekterer tiden din.
Du blir en del av en proff produksjon med erfarne skuespillere.

Send mail til casting@lekenfilm.no med kort om deg og hvorfor du vil være med, og merk emnefelt i mail med:

GUTT/MANN/DAME + ALDER,

eller:

STATIST, CREW eller ANNET

Aktuelle kandidater kalles inn til audition i Juli.

HONORAR, TID OG STED:
Opptak foregår i august/september i Oslo og omegn, fordelt på få dager.
– Hovedroller: honoreres (avtales individuelt).
– Mindre roller/statister: ulønnet, men vi dekker mat og reise, og holder opptaksdagene korte og effektive – vi respekterer tiden din. Du blir en del av en proff produksjon med erfarne skuespillere. 

Spørsmål? Send mail!

Lykke til!

items.text:
CASTING CALL!!
Non-union indie short film based in Vancouver, British Columbia.
Around 11 pages long.

Volunteer.
Food and credits provided.

Shooting around August 19-24th 2026.

LOGLINE
It's 1892 in Nova Scotia. Blythe, used to isolation, shifts her time for her new friend she meets, Agatha. Though as she gets to know her through their imaginative play, she realizes her friends dark family history may reveal the truth of their friendship.

CHARACTERS

⭐️Blythe - Lead
18-25 years old
European or African/Black ethnicities

Blythe is a passionate girl, in touch with nature and her textile abilities.
She has dreams of living in the city, though is stuck at her home duties with her mom. She is a caregiver, finds glee and beauty in everything, though her isolation makes it difficult for her to speak up for herself.

⭐️Agatha - Lead
18-25 years old
European ethnicity 

Agatha is a curious girl, as isolated in life as Blythe. Her family lives with a community, running things that would be illegal and viewed as sinister in a regular society. She is intrigued by Blythe and wants to include her in her community. Agatha is devoted, friendly, and offers a commanding presence.

⭐️Mary - Supporting (6 lines of dialogue)
35-55 years old
European or African/Black ethnicities

Stubborn, traditional, blunt, but also caring. She has a lot of responsibility on the farm and taking care of the kids while her husband works as a loyalist.

⭐️Henry - NO DIALOGUE
8-12 years old
European or African/Black ethnicities

Quiet and introverted. Is responsible for his age and respects his mother’s duties.

PLEASE CONTACT jessicabresciani@my.capilanou.ca WITH YOUR HEADSHOT, DEMO REEL AND RESUME IF INTERESTED.

items.title: CASTING CALL!!

items.text:
✨Lights. Music. Magic. We’re casting K-Pop Demon Hunters tributes! ✨ 

Do you have the energy, stage presence and performance skills to bring a high impact K-Pop act to life? 

Since the launch of our K-Pop Demon Hunters tribute act - it has been a HUGE hit!!! From more intimate smaller parties, to large scale events and festivals…even beyond the UK! 💜 

Due to such high demand, we are now looking for more performers to join our K-Pop team… a high energy, professionally choreographed act performing across the UK and beyond. 

We are looking for performers who:
✨Are age 18+
✨Are able to authentically and respectfully represent the characters heritage
✨Are reliable, professional and committed 
✨Have great stage presence and energy 
✨Dancing and singing abilities are a bonus (but not essential as all training is provided)
✨A valid UK passport is required for any work beyond the UK 

About the roll:
✨Paid performance opportunities 
✨Competitive rates of pay
✨Full training provided 
✨Events include birthday parties, private events, on stage performances, festivals and much more 
✨High quality costumes provided 
✨Be part of a supportive team 

Must be UK based and able to travel

This is not just a character roll - it’s a high energy act making dreams come true 💖💫 

If this sounds like you, we would love to hear from you! 

To apply, please email:

Wishuponastareventsltd@gmail.com

Or message us directly on Facebook 

Wish Upon a Star Events

We can’t wait to hear from you! 💜

#Kpop #performing #Acting #Dancing #Singing #Makingmagicalmoments #wishuponastar #dreams #casting #castingcall #hiring #magical #events

items.text:
Are you finding it challenging to catch the eye of casting directors with your self-tapes? It can be incredibly discouraging to invest significant time and effort without achieving the results you hope for.

 

You may be overlooking crucial elements or making common mistakes that hinder your tapes from standing out.
Join us at 𝐌𝐚𝐫𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐀𝐜𝐚𝐝𝐞𝐦𝐲 in Swinton, Manchester, for an inspiring workshop dedicated to enhancing your audition skills! This is your chance to implement meaningful improvements and truly shine. Don't let this opportunity slip away!

 

To secure your spot in the workshop, simply email 𝐦𝐚𝐫𝐛𝐥𝐞𝐚𝐜𝐚𝐝𝐞𝐦𝐲@𝐡𝐨𝐭𝐦𝐚𝐢𝐥.𝐜𝐨𝐦

Be sure to book by 𝐅𝐫𝐢𝐝𝐚𝐲, 𝐉𝐮𝐥𝐲 𝟏𝟎𝐭𝐡, to receive your sides and all necessary details.

items.text:
***** AUDITION DATES ARE AVAILABLE *****

𝐌𝐚𝐫𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐀𝐜𝐚𝐝𝐞𝐦𝐲, based in Swinton, Manchester, is not only a Spotlight-accredited drama academy but has also won multiple awards for
‘𝐁𝐞𝐬𝐭 𝐃𝐫𝐚𝐦𝐚 𝐒𝐜𝐡𝐨𝐨𝐥 𝐎𝐟 𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐘𝐞𝐚𝐫’ for two years running.
At Marble, our passion and goal are to bring out the best possible performance from our students and to work as hard as we can to help them succeed in their careers.

 

𝐖𝐞 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐢𝐬𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐢𝐦𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐯𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐭𝐚𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐚𝐥𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐝𝐲 𝐡𝐚𝐯𝐞.

 

Also, help you unlearn the bad habits that hold so many actors back, and replace them with sharp, reliable techniques.

Whether you’re just starting or looking to elevate your skills, Marble Academy is where you turn “𝐈’𝐝 𝐥𝐨𝐯𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐚𝐜𝐭” into “𝐈’𝐦 𝐛𝐮𝐢𝐥𝐝𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚 𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐥 𝐜𝐚𝐫𝐞𝐞𝐫.”

If this is something you'd be interested in, take a look at our website for all the information and student testimonials.
[[www.marbleacademy.co.uk](www.marbleacademy.co.uk)](http://www.marbleacademy.co.uk)  

Look forward to hearing from you.

 

**DON’T BE AN ACTOR BECAUSE YOU WANT TO;**
**BE AN ACTOR BECAUSE YOU *****HAVE***** TO!**

items.title: ***** AUDITION DATES ARE AVAILABLE *****

items.text:
**AUDITIONS ARE OPEN** for our short film, *Stars In Her Eyes*! We are casting for lead, supporting and background roles.

Filming locations in and around London, likely taking place August-October 2026.

**THE ASTRONAUT**

Any ethnicity, gender. 18+

5ft 8 - 6ft+

An anonymous, faceless friend, the Astronaut is a constant companion throughout Andrea’s semi-lonely childhood, until disappearing one day. This figure returns to show teenage Andrea a new path to a place where she requires no helmet or mask.

Dancing background/good at movement - needs to be able to convey acting through physicality. 

Not vocal, always wears helmet.

Needs to be confident running and happy to work with mud and be in the sea.

*Please send a short self-tape which shows how you might move as the character (+showreel optional) to*

*whereistheastronaut@gmail.com by midnight on 19th July 2026*

**YOUNG ANDREA:**

Black, playing age 8. Adventurous. Brave. Curious. Her drawings are imaginative, and she can get a bit shy. It would be great if she could get her head out of the clouds, learn to contribute in school and play with the other kids once in a while.

Needs to be confident running and happy to work with mud and be in the sea.

*Please send a 2 minute self-tape reading some of your favourite storybook or making up a story, alongside headshots (+ showreel optional) to whereistheastronaut@gmail.com by midnight on 19th July 2026*

**TEENAGE ANDREA:**

Black, playing age 15. Reserved. Determined. Independent. Andrea’s artistic ability is remarkable, but socially, she could do with some encouragement. Her writing and sketches are detailed and expansive. Sometimes in class, she seems tired, or as though she’s lost her spark.

Needs to be confident running and happy to work with mud and be in the sea.

*Please send a 2 minute self-tape reading some of your favourite storybook or making up a story, alongside headshots (+ showreel optional) to whereistheastronaut@gmail.com by midnight on 19th July 2026*

**SUPPORTING ROLES:**

**Andrea’s Mum & Dad:**

Black, playing ages 30s-40s.

Caring and loving, they are as involved as busy parents can be for their only child.

**Teacher:**

Woman, playing age 30s, any ethnicity.

Kind but firm.

**Therapist:**

White man, 50s-60s.

Clinical & condescending. A voice of ‘reality’, trying to give Andrea’s parents a diagnosis that explains their daughter’s more quirky personality traits.

*Please send a short showreel or self-tape with headshots to whereistheastronaut@gmail.com by midnight on 19th July 2026*

**SUPPORTING ARTISTS:**

We are looking for background artists to play:

School students (ages 11-18)

Police Officers

Teachers

*No acting experience required! Please email whereistheastronaut@gmail.com with a headshot to express interest by midnight on 2nd August 2026*

*Please note: This is a no-fee project across all cast and crew roles. Ideal for those who enjoy collaborative filmmaking and gaining new showreel material. Travel/expenses covered.*

Qawiiah Bisiriyu Mercy Brewer

* Script provided

**Compensation:**
💷 £80 per video
🎁 Free Lio product

Interested? Send me a PM with a recent photo and, if you have one, a link to your showreel or previous work.

www.breathelio.com

**Casting Call- Need Background Actors **

I'm casting for a comedy short film- Vijay Finds His Dating Mojo. I plan to send this film to film festivals and use it as a proof of concept for a feature film. 

**Synopsis-** An immigrant from India, Vijay, takes services from a manipulative dating coach, Jason. After several failures, Vijay decides to discard pickup lines and pretensions and be himself. He meets Sophia, and they hit it off. Will him being honest work out or backfire?

**Casting:**

People in Bar/Background artists- Men and Women in their 20s and 30s. Need 5 women and 5 men. Any ethnicity. Shoot on either 11th or 12th July.

**Shoot Location:** Vancouver Downtown

**Date:** 11th and 12th July, 2026

**Pay:** Volunteer, IMDB credit, Snippet

**To Apply:**
Please email **tomar.gautam2@yahoo.com** with:
• Resume
• Headshots

Subject line: **“Character and your name”**

items.text:
CASTING CALL 

Live action Fan Film of EPIC: The Musical (A rendition of The Odyssey)

With nearly 1 Million YouTube views on the first project, my crew and I are embarking on the next endeavor! 

This is a fan made passion project. Roles are volunteer and non-union with food, costumes, and nerdy vibes provided. 

Dates: September TBD, based on actor availability. Time commitment will be 1-5 days depending on role. 

Roles needed: male 18-35
* General background: Ancient Greek men (ethnicity does not matter for this project)
* stunts for small fight scene (great for your demo reel if you're looking to get started! Training provided if needed)
* lip syncing lines and dramatic deaths for key characters (see form for details)

For all details and more information on the project, please see the audition link: https://forms.gle/tyoNfZgnx7Zq3dtEA

For a look at the past project, check it out here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=99bRYplIKPM

Please note! This is a project made by nerds, for nerds. We are creating some really cool projects with high production value, but at the end of the day this is not for profit and is meant to bring together actors, cosplayers, and film makers to just have fun on set.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'ODYSSEUS cMy CASTING CALL ROLES NEEDED: SUITORS •ANTINOUS EURYMACHUS AMPHINOMUS MELANTHIUS PALACE MAIDS SUITORS (WITH STUNTS) Join me for the grand finale ofthe EPIC ν Projects! 'Odysseus' will be action packed, covered (fake) blood, and have enough brooding to last 20 years. This project all hands deck and youp chance to get involved and die dramati death! Vancouver BC Canada Must be 18+ Filming September 2026 (Dates TBD)'

items.title: CASTING CALL

items.text:
Casting Call (Non-Union) for ACTORS WITH EXPERIENCE IN THE HEALTHCARE SYSTEM, ALL AGES AND DEMOGRAPHICS, INCLUDING COUPLES AND FAMILIES - Paid

Looking for actors to play the role of patients and families in a hospital/nursing setting. The video clips will be used in an online training system for nurses counsellors. The session includes a prepared character backgrounds and scripted language/prompts with some improvising.

All ages, all gender expressions/identities, all ethnicities, and persons with disabilities are welcome. 

All experience levels with acting are welcome to apply. We are committed to making this a respectful and safe process, with open communication and respect for boundaries.

Comfortable English fluency is required.

We are strongly committed to authenticity in our educational portrayals, so it's preferred that actors match specific cultural backgrounds and gender identities/expressions, have some experience with hospitalization and medical treatment, and where indicated, some experience with or around certain medical conditions. 

Expected filming date is July 26, but our needs are ongoing and more will occur in the future, so please submit if you're interested at all.

Location is BCIT Burnaby Campus. Pay is $400 CAD, with the expectation of up to a half day on location. This rate is intended to compensate for both location time and prep time.

At this time, we are casting a variety of roles, including:

Cisgender woman of color, age 50-60, heavyset, preferably with past experiences of medical hospitalization and/or ER visits

Transmasc / trans man, age 18-25 (all other demographics are acceptable) with experience navigating the healthcare system

Child (age 5-10 or can realistically play that age) and their parent (all other demographics are acceptable). Ideally a real parent/child pair. Though not a must-have, it would be nice to recruit a parent/child dyad who have had their own experiences in the past of being hospitalized due to a medical issue so they can draw on those experiences for our improv cases.

Black/Afro-Canadian/African American (Sub-saharan African and/or Afro-Latino ethnicity) cisgender man, age 18-30

Good To Have: Personal History of/Familiarity with Sickle Cell Anemia (either as a patient themself or family member)

Indigenous (specific nation membership or community identity preferred), age 50-60, cisgender man, preferably heavyset. Personal history of diabetes preferred though not necessary.

Couple, age 60-70, white, cisgender woman (the patient) and her husband. Ideally, a real husband/wife couple. Actor will be portraying a patient with a history of breast cancer who broke her hip and presented to the ER. Imaging reveals her cancer has return and her prognosis is terminal.

Nurse 1: Cisgender woman (all other demographics acceptable). Preferably an actual nurse, nursing student, or someone with healthcare practitioner experience

Nurse 2: Cisgender man (all other demographics acceptable). Preferably an actual nurse, nursing student, or someone with healthcare practitioner experience

Attending Physician: White, cisgender man, age 35-60. Preferably with healthcare practitioner experience.

Please email [phil@skillsetter.com](mailto:phil@skillsetter.com) with your headshots and resume, as well as some information about you, such as gender identity, age, cultural/racial background. If you've submitted for a past session, you're welcome to submit again. We do often receive more submissions than we are able to respond to, but we do read them all, and we do save your submissions for future consideration.

items.text:
# [KRAKÓW] PROWADZĄCA / WSPÓŁTWÓRCA PODCASTU WIDEO
## **Tworzę w Krakowie profesjonalny, kobiecy kanał podcastowy (gdzie pod wspólnym, silnym szyldem funkcjonują różne autorskie pasma). Zamiast budować małe kanały od zera, łączymy siły, krzyżujemy widownie i rośniemy wielokrotnie szybciej.**

Szukam do tego projektu współtwórczyń, które chcą poprowadzić swój własny, niezależny format.

**Jak wygląda nasz podział ról?**
* **Twoja działka:** Jesteś jedyną twarzą, głosem i szefową swojego formatu. Dostajesz własną playlistę. Wchodzisz do studia i skupiasz się wyłącznie na rozmowie. Zapraszasz gości, dzielisz się wiedzą i budujesz swoją markę osobistą.
* **Moja działka (Produkcja i Technologia):** Pełnię rolę Twojego producenta i realizatora. Zdejmuję z Ciebie 100% technicznego stresu. Dysponuje studiem wideo (wielokamerowy system na pełnoklatkowych aparatach Lumix, miksery ATEM). Ogarniam też przygotowanie krótkich form (Shorts, Reels) do promocji.

**Model biznesowy (Zasady 50/50):**

Nie płacisz mi za wynajem studia ani za sprzęt. Budujemy wspólne przedsięwzięcie i dzielimy się zyskami wygenerowanymi bezpośrednio przez Twoje odcinki (przychody z YouTube, kontrakty sponsorskie w Twoim formacie, lokowania) dokładnie po połowie (50/50). Ty masz program bez wkładu finansowego, ja inwestuję swój sprzęt i wiedzę w nasz wspólny sukces.

Żeby sprawdzić nasze biznesowe dopasowanie przed kamerą, współpracę zaczniemy od krótkiego sezonu pilotażowego.

**CZEGO WYMAGAM NA START (Przeczytaj uważnie):**

Zależy mi na kobietach, które podchodzą do swoich pomysłów z pełnym profesjonalizmem. Jeśli widzisz w tym potencjał, wyślij mi wiadomość prywatną. Oczekuję maksymalnego konkretu. Twoja aplikacja musi opisywać:
* **Format i tematykę:** Jaki dokładnie podcast chcesz prowadzić i do kogo ma trafiać? (Ważna uwaga: dbając o bezpieczeństwo i profesjonalizm kanału, omijamy tematy mocno polaryzujące, takie jak ostra polityka, skrajne wojny płci, internetowe dramy czy niesprawdzona pseudonauka).
* **Twarde kompetencje:** Dlaczego to właśnie Ty powinnaś o tym mówić? Wymagam jasnego potwierdzenia Twojej wiedzy (wykształcenie, doświadczenie zawodowe, zrealizowane projekty lub biznes).
* **Bazę gości:** Czy masz własną sieć kontaktów (znajomych, współpracowników, ekspertów), których od razu będziesz w stanie zaprosić do udziału w swoim programie?

Połączmy Twoją wiedzę z moją produkcją. Stwórzmy razem miejsce, gdzie dobre, kobiece rozmowy dostaną zasięgi, na jakie zasługują. Czekam na Twoją wiadomość!

sharedPost.text:
have you ever had unseen trip in your life? whatever you had i Patt you it won't be anything like this trip, which I had taken a way back with my friend Hanan, in around 2013 , when she needed to go to New York city , to get her a word prize 🏆, as a journalist, from the Un, but she was not allowed to take the airplane, because she was pregnancy. so we had to take the Train 🚉
#foryouシ #kouwtharmuhssancookie #traintravel
Hadi Alusamii Hanan Kiswany

items.text:
Hello! We are Anna and Yurii, a couple with experience working in circuses. Available for contracts from October 2026 and for the 2027 season.

Anna — Circus Artist

• Juggling
• Hula Hoops
• Antipod Act

Yurii — Circus Assistant & Technical Crew

Yurii has experience working in circus and chapiteau environments in various support and technical roles, including:

• General worker at the circus
• Uniformed Crew
• Animal Care Assistant

Gareth finds it hard to be himself in a world where he's either too white to hang out with his black friends or too cultured to be accepted by his family.

Starring - Gareth Mort
 / Tiffany Thomas / 
James Sowle /  
Keon Martial-Phillip
 / Daniel Johnson /
 Faith Kiggundu
 / Joseph Samimi  
/ Kurtis Lowe  / 
Mr Blair
 

Producer 
- Angelika Napierala  /  Daniel Glenn-Barbour                       
Video Editor - 
4Deuce Films  
Drone Operator - Demand Drone Dimensions
Composer - Jonathan Clarke

sharedPost.text:
🎬 CALLING ALL FILMMAKERS & SCREENWRITERS! 🎬

The 3rd Annual AMT International Film Festival is accepting submissions! We are bringing the magic of independent cinema right to the heart of the world: Times Square, NYC from October 22nd – 25th, 2026. 🗽✨

To celebrate 🇺🇸Independence Day🇺🇸 we’re giving you our biggest discount of the season.

🔥 FOURTH OF JULY SPECIAL: 50% OFF! 🔥
Get a massive 50% off your submission fee this weekend only. Don’t wait until the regular deadlines—lock in your entry now for half the price!

PROMO CODE: JULYWEEKEND50

DEADLINE: This offer expires on Monday, July 6th at midnight!

🎥 What We Are Accepting:
We want to see your unique voice, regardless of the budget or style. We are accepting all genres across the following categories:

✨ Feature Films

⏱️ Short Films

📹 Documentaries

🎨 Animation

🤖 AI Films

📝 Feature Screenplays

✍️ Short Screenplays

Whether you have a gripping drama, a mind-bending sci-fi, a stunning doc, or a cutting-edge AI project, AMT is your stage.

Ready to screen in Times Square? Head over to FilmFreeway now, submit your project, and use code JULYWEEKEND50 at checkout! 🎟️

#AMTFilmFest #IndieFilm #Filmmakers #Screenwriting

items.text:
Szukasz swojej szansy przed kamerą? Dobrze trafiłeś! 🎬👇
Promujemy nowe twarze i otwieramy drzwi do świata reklam, filmów oraz seriali! Naszą misją jest dawanie możliwości osobom, które chcą spróbować swoich sił na planie.
W naszej agencji stawiamy na absolutną różnorodność i autentyczność. Niezależnie od tego, czy jesteś pochodzenia europejskiego, azjatyckiego, afrykańskiego – Twoja wyjątkowość to Twój największy atut! 🌍✨
Co warto wiedzieć?
Brak doświadczenia? Żaden problem! Stawiamy na naturalność i Twoją prawdziwą energię.
Wiek i wygląd: Szukamy ludzi w każdym wieku, o różnorodnej urodzie i unikalnym stylu.
Zrób pierwszy krok: Nie musisz być zawodowym aktorem ani modelem – wystarczy, że będziesz sobą!
📩 Jak do nas dołączyć? Napisz wiadomość prywatną (DM) bądź przez naszą stronę internetową castella.pl.

items.text:
🎉👰🤵 Niech dzieci mają swoje małe wesele… a dorośli spokojnie bawią się do rana! 🥳✨

Organizujesz wesele, poprawiny lub inną uroczystość? Zadbamy o najmłodszych gości, tworząc dla nich wyjątkową strefę pełną atrakcji! 🎈🎨🍿

🌟 Oferujemy:
🏰 Dmuchańce
🎭 Animacje i zabawy
🎯 Gry i konkursy
🍿 Świeży popcorn
🍭 Pyszną watę cukrową
😊 I mnóstwo uśmiechu!

💛 Dbamy o bezpieczeństwo dzieci i świetną atmosferę, dzięki czemu rodzice mogą w pełni cieszyć się zabawą i wspólnym świętowaniem.

🎊 Każdą ofertę przygotowujemy indywidualnie i dopasowujemy do Waszego budżetu.

📩 Napisz do nas w wiadomości prywatnej na Facebooku

📧 lub na adres: [promocjeevents@gmail.com](mailto:promocjeevents@gmail.com)

📅 Sprawdź dostępne terminy już dziś!

#Wesele #AtrakcjeDlaDzieci #AnimacjeDlaDzieci #Dmuchańce #WataCukrowa #Popcorn #WeseleZDziećmi #ImprezyOkolicznościowe #PromocjeEvents

First Sight International LLC is pleased to offer access to a diverse calendar of events in Los Angeles. These events encompass a wide spectrum of industries, including music, television, film, fashion, and brand activations. Service provides unlimited access on a monthly basis.

For detailed information regarding our services  please reply to this email.
firstsightintlpr@gmail.com

We appreciate your interest and look forward to hearing from you. We kindly request that all inquiries be directed to this email address, and avoid direct messaging on other platforms. This is a premium service, and we prioritize serious inquiries only.

7/8 Casting
UPDATE: Just sent options to the director, thank you again everyone!

Had another person cancel today so looking for background replacement asap!

Role: 50+ female church goer 

Location: 90037

Call time: likely between 10am and noon but depends based on what time they wrap tomorrow night. 

Wardrobe: 3 Colorful, Sundays best options

Pay: $135/8

I just a need photo of you to submit to the director. PM me. I’ll also need email and phone number for the call sheet

items.text:
Looking for 5 actors who can sing local to Los Angeles to be part of an Audio book illustration project for an original musical. The musical style is Jazz Hip Hop.Please note: THE PROJECT IS UNPAID
Please email headshot, resume, and a sample of your singing and/reel to Georgejosephr11@gmail.com.

DeAndre Westwood: 
Age: mid 30s early forties 
Ethnicity: Black
Occupation: Vice Principal of Diamond Hill High School
Description: Alumni of Diamond Hill High School. Very passionate about education and the personal responsibility of the individual. Although he recognizes peoples’ struggles do exist, he’s doesn’t personalize them.

Marcus Harrison:
Age: 40s
Ethnicity: Black
Occupation: Principal of Diamond Hill High school
Description: Harrison has been principal of Diamond Hill High School for the past 6 years. He was never a resident of the city but experienced similar struggles growing up in Harlem, New York. An individual who doesn’t mind getting his hands dirty believing he’s making the best possible decision for himself and everyone else when even the school board doesn’t care.

David Garner:
Age: 18
Occupation: Senior in High School
Ethnicity: Ambiguous
Description: David is a strong willed individual, jokester, but stands his ground. Raised by a single father he does his best to cope with the environment and circumstances he was dropped into.

Mr. Carpe/Robert Atkins
Age: 50s – 60s
Occupation: Janitor
Ethnicity: Black/African descent
Description: Mr. Carpe is a former teacher of Diamond Hill High from when Westwood was a student. He does this for the students' sake no longer needing to work but still wanting to do something for the next generation. He talks to Westwood and knows everything going on in the campus as the janitor but avoids getting involved to allow himself to present an unbiased standpoint for all sides

Jonathan Hernandez: 
Age: 16
Ethnicity: Hispanic/Latin descent
Occupation:  Senior in High School & Student Representative of the board (Dreamer Student)
Description: Jonathan has always had his decisions made for him. His parents baby him a lot because he’s slightly on the spectrum. He respects Jordan a lot because he doesn’t cut him any slack and treats him as fully capable. Jonathan is a smart kid full of potential who really likes going to school. Although he struggles to express himself he means well always putting the masses before himself.

topComments.text: Which, LA? Los Angeles or Louisiana,  or Lower Alabama?

Project: DeWalt Pro Outdoor Campaign

*Talent will possibly be needed 1-3 days plus fitting, please list any conflicts*

$1000 plus 20% per shoot day

Real, professional arborists in their 20's and early 30's who have certificates and experience in tree climbing and limb cutting. You must have hands on experience performing this work safely. *If you have already submitted, you do NOT need to submit again. We have your submission!*

Kind Regards, 
Angela Boehm Casting 

PLEASE NOTE: This is just a submission. If you are booked, we will reach out to YOU.

sharedPost.text:
We’re looking for a diverse group of actors to take part in R Online Read series!👩‍💻
​
⚽ With football fans huddled around TV screens, holding their breaths as penalty shots are taken and chants of ‘It’s coming home!’ spilling out of every pub, it's hard to avoid the World Cup this month. 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿
​However, for R next Online Read, we take a look at the darker side of the beautiful game, with the fantastic new play ‘THE ACADEMY’ by Nicole Moody. A play that tackles heartbreaking themes of extortion, fraud and trafficking that lurk in the shadows, yet underpin this massive multimillion industry.
​
🎭 We are looking for actors of all ages, genders and ethnicities to help breathe life into this fantastic new script!
⭐Character breakdown:
Agent (any) 30s
Dan (male, 40s) - kit man
Pete (male, early 20s) - kit man
Faye (female, 40s) - Jack’s Mum
Viv (female, late teens) - Faye’s daughter and Jack’s sister
Jack (male,15) - Pre-professional talented footballer
Ed (male, 40’s) - Jack’s Dad
John (male, 30’s) - CEO at a football Club
Lenny (male, 50’s) - ex-manager
Amanda (female, 20’s) works in catering
Ruby (female, 20’s) - Amanda’s friend
Mr Salist (male, 50’s) - Chairman of a football club
Fatima Diop (female, 30’s) - Malick’s Mother
Hamza (Any) - charity worker
​
📅 Taking place Online, on the 21st of July @ 6:30pm (BST) To join our virtual table read of a brand new play, destined for the stage, learn more  👇

https://www.rcreatives.co.uk/event-details-registration/31-the-academy-by-nicole-moody
​

#RCreatives #OnlineReading #Writer #Actor #ActorsWanted #ItsComingHome

items.text:
There isn’t a handbook for raising a young performer but there is a lot to learn along the way! 🎭

Whether your child is attending their very first audition or already has professional experience, the industry can feel exciting, rewarding... and sometimes overwhelming.

That’s why we’ve put together a few reminders we believe every parent should know.

✨ Success isn’t just about booking the job.
✨ Keeping profiles and materials up to date matters.
✨ Most importantly, helping your child continue to love performing is the greatest success of all.

Behind every young performer is a parent, guardian or family member cheering them on, driving them to rehearsals, learning new industry terms and celebrating every milestone, big or small!

We hope this carousel helps you feel a little more informed and a little more supported on that journey.

💬 What’s one piece of advice you wish you’d been given when your child started performing?

📌 Save this post for whenever you need a reminder, and share it with another parent navigating the industry.

COMMENT ‘SELF TAPE GUIDE’ and we will send you our free guide 🤩

May be a graphic of text that says 'chorey SUCCESS ISN'T MEASURED → BY BOOKINGS. Confidence. Resilience. Creativity. Enjoyment. These are are just as important.'
May be a graphic of ‎text that says '‎cho Chi chorry pips ciees יחות 4 THINGS EVERY PARENT OF A YOUNG PERFORMER SHOULD KNOW cherrypipsacting.co.uk‎'‎

May be a graphic of text that says 'YOUR CHILD'S AGENT IS YOUR TEAMMATE. Keep them informed about: .Holidays •School commitments → •New skills Appearance changes Communication helps them submit your child for the right opportunities.'

May be a graphic of text that says 'LEARN HOW to SELF-TAPE. SELF- ΓΑΡΕ. Many first-round auditions now happen from home, so creating a simple self-tape setup is a valuable skill. Message us and we will send you our FREE SELF-TAPE GUIDE for for and young performers. parents'
